intro: Azadirachta indica, commonly known as neem, is a plant-based remedy that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The tincture extracted from its leaves and seeds is believed to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues, including skin conditions and digestive problems. However, it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using neem tincture, as it can interact with certain medications and have adverse effects in large doses.
